title: The Crystal Vault
storySnippet: Within the crystal vault, shimmering words float in the air, and only an expert speller can capture them.

data.sentenceContext: Their serendipitous discovery of the hidden map changed the course of the quest.
The storyteller's tale had such verisimilitude that everyone believed it was true.
The queen's idiosyncrasy of always wearing purple amused the court.
The iridescent butterfly wings caught the sunlight as it flew over the meadow.
The labyrinthine palace corridors took hours to navigate without a guide.
The bourgeoisie gathered in the town square to discuss the new trade laws.
She placed a white chrysanthemum on the memorial as a sign of respect.
The antediluvian forest was said to have existed since before the great flood.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: It was a ___ meeting -- they both happened to be at the same market.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The novel's ___ made readers feel as if the events had truly happened.
data.hint: The appearance of being true or real

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: His habit of humming during meals was a harmless ___.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The ___ glow of the gemstone shifted between green and violet.
data.hint: Showing rainbow-like colors that shift and change
